  • Uses of JdbcOutbox.Builder in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JdbcOutbox.Builder
    JdbcOutbox.builder()
    Creates a fresh JdbcOutbox.Builder.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder
    JdbcOutbox.Builder.clock(Clock newClock)
    Sets the Clock used by the default id generator.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder
    JdbcOutbox.Builder.connectionSupplier(ConnectionSupplier newConnectionSupplier)
    Sets the ConnectionSupplier that provides the JDBC connection used by every publish.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder
    JdbcOutbox.Builder.dialect(OutboxDialect newDialect)
    Pins a specific OutboxDialect, bypassing auto-detection.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder
    JdbcOutbox.Builder.idGenerator(IdGenerator newIdGenerator)
    Sets the IdGenerator used to assign UUIDs to events that don't carry one.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder
    JdbcOutbox.Builder.schema(String newSchema)
    Sets the schema qualifier for the outbox table.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder
    JdbcOutbox.Builder.tableName(String newTableName)
    Sets the outbox table name.
